i18n_workflow.overview: This workflow guides you through internationalization tasks including translating i18n files, managing translation keys, and maintaining consistency across multiple language files.

actions.action: Identify the type of i18n task (translation, key sync, validation, etc.)
Identify target files and their structure
Clarify any specific requirements or constraints

tools.tool: read_file - Examine existing translation files to understand structure
list_files - Find all language files in the i18n directory
search_files - Find specific translation keys across files

checklist.item: Note any pluralization or interpolation patterns
Check for consistent export format (default export, named export, etc.)

phase.name: preparation
phase.description: Prepare for translation by gathering context and identifying scope

step.action: Read the source language file completely
step.rationale: Understand full context and structure before translating

step.action: Identify all keys that need translation
step.rationale: Create complete list for systematic translation

step.action: Note any special syntax (interpolation, plurals, HTML)

phase.name: translation
phase.description: Perform accurate translation while preserving structure

principles.principle: Maintain exact key names and structure
Preserve technical terms and brand names

step.action: Translate all string values to target language
step.important: Never change key names, only values

step.action: Preserve all technical elements
Adapt cultural references appropriately
step.note: Consider date formats, currency, and cultural context

checks.check: All keys from source file are present in target file
No keys are added or removed
File syntax is valid (proper TypeScript/JSON format)

phase.name: analysis
phase.description: Identify missing or extra keys across language files

step.action: Read all language files in the i18n directory
step.tool: list_files with recursive on i18n directory

step.action: Compare key structures across all files
step.output: List of missing keys per language file

step.action: Identify any extra keys not in base language
step.rationale: Find orphaned keys that may need cleanup

phase.name: synchronization
phase.description: Add missing keys to language files

step.action: For each language with missing keys, add them with appropriate translations
step.important: Maintain exact position in nested structure

step.action: Use apply_diff to add keys in correct locations
step.tool: apply_diff - surgical addition of missing keys

step.action: Report any orphaned keys for user decision
step.tool: ask_followup_question - confirm deletion of extra keys

new_key_workflow.description: Add new translation keys across all language files

step.title: Determine Key Location
step.action: Identify the appropriate nested location for the new key

step.title: Add to Base Language
step.action: Add key with English translation to base file (en.ts)

step.title: Propagate to All Languages
step.action: Add the same key to all other language files with translated values
step.important: Maintain consistent nesting depth and location

step.title: Verify Consistency
step.action: Confirm key exists in identical location across all files

validation_workflow.description: Validate translation files for completeness and correctness

structural_checks.check: All language files have matching key structures

content_checks.check: No untranslated keys (keys with source language values)
HTML tags properly closed and preserved

reporting.action: Create a detailed report of validation results

general_translation_workflow.description: Translate general text content (documentation, UI strings, etc.)

step.title: Understand Context
step.action: Determine the purpose and audience of the content
Identify any technical terms or domain-specific language

step.title: Preserve Formatting
step.action: Maintain markdown formatting, code blocks, and special syntax

step.title: Translate Content
step.action: Translate text while preserving technical accuracy
Adapt examples and cultural references appropriately

step.title: Review Quality
step.action: Ensure translation reads naturally in target language
Verify technical accuracy is maintained

completion_criteria.criterion: All requested translations are complete and accurate
File structure and syntax are valid
No keys are missing or duplicated

scenario.description: Base language file (en.ts) is missing or unreadable
scenario.action: Ask user to confirm the base language and file location
Fix syntax errors before proceeding with translation
Use read_file to identify exact error location

scenario.description: Target file structure doesn't match source
scenario.action: Offer to restructure target file to match source
Ask user for clarification before translating
Provide multiple translation options when appropriate

best_practices_reference.practice: Always read existing files before making changes
Use apply_diff for surgical edits to preserve formatting
Maintain alphabetical or logical key ordering
Keep translations concise while maintaining meaning
Test that file can be imported after changes
